# TensorFeed.ai
> AI news, model tracking, and real-time AI ecosystem data.
> Designed for humans and AI agents.

## API Endpoints
- /api/agents/news — Latest AI news articles (JSON)
- /api/agents/status — AI service status (JSON)
- /api/agents/models — Model release tracker (JSON)
- /api/agents/papers — Latest arXiv AI papers (JSON)
- /api/agents/pricing — AI API pricing data (JSON)

## Feeds
- /feed.xml — RSS 2.0 feed of all news
- /feed.json — JSON Feed of all news
- /feed/anthropic.xml — Anthropic-only RSS
- /feed/openai.xml — OpenAI-only RSS
- /feed/research.xml — Research papers RSS

## About
TensorFeed.ai is operated by Pizza Robot Studios LLC.
Sister sites: terminalfeed.io, vr.org
Contact: evan@pizzarobotstudios.com
